sections.paragraph:
Original: גּפר

Transliteration: gôpher

Phonetic: go'-fer

BDB Definition:

  1. cypress?, gopher, gopher wood
    1. wood of which the ark was made
    2. meaning and exact type unknown

Origin: from an unused root, probably meaning to house in

TWOT entry: 374

Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine
